sessionName: Threshold 3×8 min @ T (90 s rec) + MHR retest finisher
intro: W7 Tue, Base (§4.C W7): threshold run, 3×8 min @ T (90 s jog rec) — longer reps than W6's 5×5. Run only — Hyp A is Wed per §2.A. No lift today.

RUN-MHR RETEST folded into today (Adj #45/#9). Owed since W6–W8; after the 3×8 T work + a short easy jog, finish with a max-HR effort and capture peak HR. Treat the number as a FLOOR, not a ceiling — a max effort at the end of T work may under-read (W1 rower test: effort 2 couldn't re-hit the effort-1 peak under fatigue).

Achilles trending clean (Adj #44): Mon read clean during/post — first non-reactive report since the flare. Check the AM read first. The MHR ramp adds concentric calf/Achilles load — if the tendon's sore AM or flares during, drop the finisher (the T work is the priority; MHR can move to a fresh standalone day).

flags: RUN-MHR RETEST (Adj #45/#9): capture peak HR off the finisher. Floor, not ceiling. If it reads only marginally over 191 → a clean standalone 1500m all-out (or fresh-day treadmill ramp) stays the gold-standard follow-up. If it confirms ≥195–205 → recompute Z2 (≈170–177) / Z3 (≈184–192) per Adj #9 and lift the off-191 Z1 cap. Strong prior evidence already points >191 (W5 Tue T-peak 188, W5 Mon easy-peak 189 nasal-clean, W6 Tue T-peak 183 = 96% of 191).
T PACE LOCKED 8:00/mi (Adj #26) — don't slow to 8:05–8:10. RPE 7 / RIR 2 and the coolest T-peak in the log (183) confirmed it legit threshold. Hold it even across all three 8-min reps.

ACHILLES (Adj #44/#34): AM-clean read pending — if clean today it releases the calf 335 / soleus-progression holds at Wed Hyp A. The MHR ramp is a calf/Achilles spike; skip the finisher if AM-sore or if it provokes sharp pain. Escalate per §11.E on swelling / sudden weakness (Accutane tendon risk).
HR (Adj #9): anchor the T reps by pace/RPE, not the off-191 ≤155 cap (rower-test artifact). Only the finisher is HR-driven.

SHOE: Zoom Fly 6 acceptable for this short tempo if the Achilles is AM-tolerant (Adj #34 — carbon/low-drop reserved for short tempo); Vomero Plus the conservative pick if reactive. Treadmill 1% needed for the MHR ramp regardless.
cardio.workout: 3×8 min @ T (8:00/mi), 90 s jog rec → ~3–5 min easy jog → MHR finisher: treadmill 1% incline, ~2–3 min progressive build (climb pace/grade), last 30–60 s flat-out, capture peak HR.

targets.hr: T reps by pace/RPE not HR (Adj #9); finisher = record the peak HR

cardio.warmup: 1.0–1.5 mi easy build to T pace (§4.A). A proper opener matters — W6 Tue's controlled 167 opener came from a real WU vs W5 Tue's cold 127→180 ramp.
cardio.cooldown: 1.0 mi easy / Z1 after the finisher; SI prehab — Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1. Gentle on the tendon, no aggressive calf stretching.
cues: Hold 8:00/mi even across all three reps — don't let the longer 8-min reps drift fast early.
Cadence 180 spm on the T work.
Finisher: build progressively, only the last 30–60 s truly flat-out; get the peak HR number.
Skip the finisher if the Achilles is reactive AM or flares during — the T session is the deliverable.

currentLoads.note: 145×5 RIR 0 by mistake, then 140×5/5 RIR 2/1; 140 done at prescribed reps (last set RIR 1, above RPE 7). +5 → 145 next Wed (§5), expect RPE 8-9 — near top of LP, AMRAP/TM re-test due ~W8

85×8 RIR 0 then 80×8/8 RIR 0/0 — 85 bump to failure, 80 also failure (regressed vs W5 Thu 80×10 clean); long-run-AM fatigue. Adj #18 NOT satisfied (Adj #36)

20×12 RIR 0; 17.5×12/12 RIR 0/0 — 20 bump failed, 17.5 also to failure. User directive: permanently 17.5 until clean (Adj #19 reverted, Adj #37)
55×12/12/10 RIR 2/1/0 — reps improved sets 1-2 (12/12 vs W6 Wed 10/10) but set 3 still failure — hold 55 until clean RIR 1 set 3 (Adj #21/#30 open)
55×12/12/12 RIR 0/0/0 — bumped 52.5→55, reps held but all 3 sets to failure; hold 55 until clean RIR 1 set 3 (Adj #38)
125×15 RIR 2/1 — holding clean since W4 Tue bump; tighter than prior
325×12/9/11 RIR 2/0/0 — Adj #34/#40; 335 bump deferred until Achilles AM-clean; set 1 on target but sets 2-3 ran to failure vs the no-failure instruction
65×12 RIR 4/3/2 — set 3 RIR 2 on target; openers soft → bump-eligible 70 next if set 3 ≥RIR 2 (Adj #32)
BW×12 ×3 — progressed 10→12 reps (Adj #41 satisfied); add load or progress further next
Skipped W6 Sat (Adj #42); keep 60s × 3, Adj #31 deepen-knee/add-load DEFERRED until Achilles AM-clean (Adj #34) — isometric is tendon-friendly
